name: Alcohol Tester — AT 6000 Breath Analyser
shortDescription: Portable digital breath alcohol tester with audio alarm, for driver and site safety checks.
longDescription: A handheld breath alcohol tester using a flat-surface alcohol sensor for quick, repeatable readings, with a digital LCD display and an audio/visual alarm when the result exceeds a preset limit. Used for pre-shift driver checks and site access screening where alcohol policy compliance needs to be verified quickly.

images.alt: Alcohol Tester — AT 6000 Breath Analyser supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
